_comment: Per-API setup recipes surfaced by `cocoon setup-auth` and the setup_auth MCP action; embedded in auth_missing payloads as setup_methods. Hand-curated because upstream printing-press manifests don't expose login URLs or cookie names. Schema fields: method (browser_session|manual|oauth_browser), login_url, domain, cookie_names, env_var, instructions.

airbnb.instructions: 1) Open the login URL in your browser and sign in.  2) Open DevTools → Application → Cookies → https://www.airbnb.com.  3) Copy the value of the `_user_attributes` cookie.  4) Paste it when prompted (or run `cocoon auth airbnb --env AIRBNB_COOKIE=<value>`).
